creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text:
Well, portlint's fine with it (though it's just a version bump, so there can't be much new for it to complain about).  I'm not setup to poudriere it, but it builds and installs fine on both directly:

% pkg info -x launchp
py27-launchpadlib-1.10.7
py36-launchpadlib-1.10.7
